arts.ttl: Emerson rescues point for West Ham against Aston Villa
arts.sum: A second-half header from Emerson earned West Ham United a deserved 1-1 draw with Aston Villa, as Graham Potter's team produced an encouraging display at Villa Park. An excellent Jacob Ramsey goal had given the hosts the lead after eight minutes before they lost defender Tyrone Mings to a worrying knee injury.

arts.ttl: West Ham in the race to sign 29-year-old Bundesliga ace this month
arts.sum: Portuguese International striker André Silva has been linked with the move away from RB Leipzig this month. The German outfit are open to letting the player leave and they are willing to send him out on loan or a permanent transfer. According to Philipp Hinze, West Ham United are in the race to secure his […] The post West Ham in the race to sign 29-year-old Bundesliga ace this month appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: West Ham set for transfer windfall as playmaker nears Saudi move
arts.sum: Former West Ham United midfielder Said Benrahma is reportedly closing in on a move to Saudi Arabia. According to Footmercato, the 29-year-old’s representatives are close to securing an agreement over a January transfer. His move to Saudi Arabia will result in a transfer windfall for the Hammers. When the player joined Lyon last winter, West […] The post West Ham set for transfer windfall as playmaker nears Saudi move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery admits Aston Villa interest in centre-back Juan Foyth
arts.sum: Villa are looking to add to their squad before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Aston Villa 'In Talks' for 'Main Target'
arts.sum: Aston Villa are keen on signing the defender who 'grew' under Unai Emery and has Premier League experience.

arts.ttl: The Aston Villa weakness Celtic could exploit identified by Unai Emery as McGinn sparks Champions League hype train
arts.sum: Injuries in a key position look like they could cause issues for Aston Villa as they prepare to welcome the Hoops

arts.ttl: Tyrone Mings injury update as Unai Emery makes 'positive' Aston Villa claim
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery is hopeful the knee injury Tyrone Mings suffered against West Ham is not going to keep him sidelined for long. "After the first test we did, I think it is not a relevant injury for a long time," Emery said.

arts.ttl: Steely-eyed Unai Emery has final say on Jhon Duran transfer stance with clear message for suitors
arts.sum: But asked after the Hammers draw about a player who looked likely to leave Villa last summer before signing a new deal with the club, Emery made his position crystal clear. Duran joined Villa in January 2023 from Chicago Fire in a deal worth £18m after he scored eight goals and set up six more in 28 appearances for the MLS club.

arts.ttl: Draw 'not enough' for ambitious Villa - Emery
arts.sum: Unai Emery says his Aston Villa side today were "not bad" but that it wasn't "enough" for where they want to be, after West Ham came from behind to draw 1-1.

arts.ttl: Emerson’s header earns draw for West Ham as loss of Mings hurts Aston Villa
arts.sum: The loss of Tyrone Mings to another potentially serious knee injury overshadowed this niggly draw as Aston Villa failed to win for the sixth successive league game after a midweek Champions League tie. The former Villa captain, only three months after returning from the second ACL injury of his career, looks certain to miss this Wednesday’s crucial European game here against Celtic. With Pau Torres still injured and Diego Carlos just transferred to Fenerbahce, they are light in this position. Continue reading...
